mapper.insert: insert into nx_community_goods_media ( nx_comm_goods_id, nx_comm_goods_media_type, nx_comm_goods_media_url, nx_comm_goods_media_thumbnail_url, nx_comm_goods_media_sort, nx_comm_goods_media_is_primary, nx_comm_goods_media_status, nx_comm_goods_media_file_size, nx_comm_goods_media_file_name ) values ( #{nxCommGoodsId}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaType}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaUrl}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaThumbnailUrl}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaSort}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaIsPrimary}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaStatus}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaFileSize}, #{nxCommGoodsMediaFileName} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM nx_community_goods_media WHERE nx_comm_goods_id = #{goodsId} AND nx_comm_goods_media_status = 1 ORDER BY nx_comm_goods_media_sort ASC, nx_comm_goods_media_id ASC
SELECT * FROM nx_community_goods_media WHERE nx_comm_goods_id = #{goodsId} AND nx_comm_goods_media_is_primary = 1 AND nx_comm_goods_media_status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO nx_community_goods_media ( nx_comm_goods_id, nx_comm_goods_media_type, nx_comm_goods_media_url, nx_comm_goods_media_thumbnail_url, nx_comm_goods_media_sort, nx_comm_goods_media_is_primary, nx_comm_goods_media_status, nx_comm_goods_media_file_size, nx_comm_goods_media_file_name ) VALUES
( #{item.nxCommGoodsId}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaType}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaUrl}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaThumbnailUrl}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaSort}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaIsPrimary}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaStatus}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaFileSize}, #{item.nxCommGoodsMediaFileName} )
